articles.author: Nicole Winfield, Nalova Akua
articles.title: Pope arrives in Cameroon as separatists announce 3-day pause in fighting - AP News
articles.description: Pope Leo XIV has arrived in the central African nation of Cameroon on the second leg of his Africa tour. He's bringing a message of peace to its separatist region, where fighters have announced a three-day pause in fighting. He'll also meet Wednesday with Pre…
articles.content: YAOUNDE, Cameroon. (AP) Pope Leo XIV arrived Wednesday in the central African nation of Cameroon with a message of peace for its separatist region and for talks with President Paul Biya, the 93-year-… [+4229 chars]
